ddls:
CREATE TABLE "global_energy_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the entry */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Name of the entity (e.g., World, Country) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code representing the entity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "coal" REAL /* Coal consumption/production values */,
  "oil" REAL /* Oil consumption/production values */,
  "gas" REAL /* Gas consumption/production values */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy consumption/production */,
  "renewable_energy" REAL /* Renewable energy consumption/production */,
  "non_renewable_energy" REAL /* Non-renewable energy consumption/production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Country population */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type (e.g., Coal, Oil, Gas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy type */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of the energy type (e.g., fossil, renewable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_data" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for consumption record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country consuming the energy */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of energy being consumed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the consumption record */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Consumption value for the given year */,
  "per_capita_consumption" REAL /* Per capita energy consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for production record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country producing the energy */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of energy being produced */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production record */,
  "production_value" REAL /* Production value for the given year */,
  "production_capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics were calculated */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption for the year */,
  "total_production" REAL /* Total energy production for the year */,
  "energy_dependency_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of energy dependency */,
  "self_sufficiency_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of self-sufficiency in energy production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES global_energy_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "total_gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity being accessed (e.g., global_energy_data, countries) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the energy source (e.g., fossil, renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "carbon_intensity" REAL /* Carbon intensity of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impacts" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy impact record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country affected by the policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "impact_year" INTEGER /* Year the impact was measured */,
  "emission_reduction" REAL /* Reduction in greenhouse gas emissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impacts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country implementing the initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the initiative started */,
  "investment" REAL /* Investment in the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_initiatives_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_energy_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is reported */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption for that year */,
  "total_production" REAL /* Total energy production for that year */,
  "energy_intensity" REAL /* Energy intensity of the country's economy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the renewable energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the renewable energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the renewable energy source */,
  "capacity_factor" REAL /* Capacity factor of the renewable energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_renewable_energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-renewable energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-renewable energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the non-renewable energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the non-renewable energy source */,
  "reserves" REAL /* Reserves of the non-renewable energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy storage record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of energy storage (e.g., battery, pumped hydro) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy storage */,
  "utilization_rate" REAL /* Utilization rate of the energy storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_storage_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
